source_title: 10 Rendering/04 Unreal to Nuke MRQ Config

evidences.content: 现在，您想从电影渲染队列中获取 AOV。 So now you want to get AOVs out of Movie Render Queue. 随着时间的推移，很多人都问过这个问题、 Now a lot of people have asked over time, 如何从电影渲染队列中获取 AOV？ how do we get AOVs out of Movie Render Queue? 我们有很大的灵活性来从虚幻中获取数据、 And we have a lot of flexibility to get data passes out of Unreal, 而这些都是非常容易获得的。 and those are really easy to get. 但在后期制作和视觉特效工作流程中、 But in post-production and VFX workflows, 很多时候，我们会渲染出所有不同的灯光 a lot of times we'll render out all of our different lights 的渲染引擎、 out of the render engine of choice, 然后在合成软件中重新组合所有内容。 and reassemble everything inside of your compositing software. 现在，我马上就能证明原因所在、 Now I can demonstrate why in just a minute, 但我一次又一次地发现 but I found time and time again, 这通常是更改灯光和合成的最快方法 that usually the fastest way to make lighting and compositing changes 这是您在后期制作时，在已经渲染之后所做的、 that you would make in post, after you've already rendered, 老实说，在实时场景中进行这些更改要快得多。 it's honestly much faster to make all of those changes in your live scene. 如果您需要重新点燃某样东西或移动某样东西、 If you need to relight something or move something around, 一般来说，在虚幻中进行更改会更快、 generally it is going to be faster to make that change inside of Unreal, 并重新渲染输出结果。 and re-render your output. 这就是我一直以来对待虚幻的方式、 This is the way that I've always approached Unreal, 它让我受益匪浅。 and it has served me well. 让我们进入 "电影渲染队列"、 So let's hop into Movie Render Queue, 看看我们需要如何在这里设置配置、 and look at how we need to set up our configs here, 设置面板，为 Nuke 或任何合成软件渲染。 this settings panel, to render this out for Nuke or any compositing software. 因此，我在这里启用了一些插件，希望引起大家的注意。 So I do have some plugins enabled here that I want to bring to your attention. 第一种是不带虚幻功能的。 The first one is one that does not come with Unreal. 它叫 Nuke Server，是 The Foundry 开发的一款工具。 So it's called Nuke Server, and this is a tool created by The Foundry. 我将在这里留下链接，以便您使用。 I will leave a link here so that you can use this. 这实际上是为了让您可以在 Nuke 中使用一个名为 "虚幻阅读器 "的节点。 This is actually meant so that you can use a node called Unreal Reader inside of Nuke. 现在，我可以做一个很长很长的解释 Now, I could give a very long and lengthy explanation 为什么这个节点几乎毫无用处、 about why this node is pretty much useless, 而实际上并没有做任何有用的事情，这就是苛刻的批评。 and doesn't actually do anything useful, to be a harsh critic. 但这一切的原因在于 But the reason why is all that this is doing 正在使用我们的 "电影渲染队列 "配置设置、 is taking our Movie Render Queue config settings, 并在 Nuke 中打开它们。 and opening them up inside of Nuke. 我发现这样做几乎总是更有效率 And I find that it's almost always more efficient 将其呈现为图像序列、 to render this out to an image sequence, 而不是同时打开虚幻和 Nuke、 instead of having Unreal and Nuke open at the same time, 然后即时渲染相同的场景。 and then rendering the same scene on the fly. 只要您开始在虚幻中大力推动您的场景、 As soon as you start pushing your scene hard inside of Unreal, 你会在两者之间崩溃、 you're going to crash between the two, 而且这样渲染序列需要很长时间。 and it just takes forever to render out sequences this way. 因此，我认为永远不要使用虚幻阅读器。 So I would say never, ever use Unreal Reader. 就我个人而言，我从未发现它能真正节省时间、 Personally, I have never found it to actually save any time, 或提供任何真正的价值。 or have any real value that it's providing. 我发现使用这种配置进行渲染是最有效的方法。 I find that just rendering out using this config is the most effective way. 让我们来谈谈原因。 So let's get into why. 因此，我们在这里要做的是，当我们启用这个插件时、 So what we're doing here is, when we have this plugin enabled, 我们将得到这个 foundry.exr 序列。 we'll get this foundry.exr sequence. 这样就能更好地控制过扫描。 And this will just allow us to have a better overscan control. 现在是压缩类型，您可以将其设置为 "无"、 Now the compression type, you either want to set this to None, 但如果设置为 "无"，您的 EXR 文件将会非常大。 although if you set it to None, your EXR files are going to be gigantic. 因此，我倾向于将其设置为 Zip 16 Scanlines 作为压缩设置。 So I tend to set this to Zip 16 Scanlines as my compression setting. 这里有一点需要注意，如果您设置了 DWAB 压缩、 One thing to note here, if you set up DWAB compression, 这是一种最新、最先进的压缩方式、 which is the latest and greatest form of compression, 这会破坏你的 Cryptomats 和对象 ID、 this can screw up your Cryptomats, your object IDs, 当我们跳进 Nuke 时，它将大显身手。 which will show off when we hop into Nuke. 因此，这无疑是最好的压缩设置。 So this is definitely the best compression setting. 因此，我们需要启用 Nuke Server 插件。 So we need this Nuke Server plugin enabled. 输入 "电影"，然后选择 "所有插件"、 If you type in Movie, and I'll select All Plugins here, 这里有几个有用的插件。 there's a couple useful plugins we can have here. 显然，我们需要 "电影渲染队列"。 Obviously, we need Movie Render Queue. 但更重要的是，我们需要这个 "电影渲染队列 "附加渲染通道。 But more importantly, we need this Movie Render Queue Additional Render Passes. 这将为我们提供对象 ID，我们可以将其用于 Cryptomats、 This is going to give us object IDs, which we can use for Cryptomats, 可以让我们选择场景中的任何对象、 which will let us select any object in our scene, 并在后期获得哑光效果，这非常有用。 and get a matte for it in post, which is super helpful. 您可以为每一个物体获得完美的哑光效果。 You can get a perfect matte for every object. 这真的非常非常好。 And that's really, really nice. 然后，我还会启用一个名为 Apple ProRes 的插件。 And then one other plugin I would enable is called Apple ProRes. 这样，我们就可以将图像导出为视频片段。 So this will actually let us export our images into a video clip. 否则，我们总是将它们渲染成图像序列。 Otherwise, we're always rendering them into image sequences. 因此，当我启用 Apple ProRes 插件时、 So when I have that Apple ProRes plugin enabled, 我们只需将其渲染为 ProRes 文件即可、 we can just render this out as a ProRes file, 这很有用，可以帮你节省一些时间。 which can be useful, can help save you some time. 但现在，我会把它删掉。 But for now, I'll delete that. 我们有延迟渲染设置、 We have our Deferred Render Settings, 作为复习，延迟渲染只是匹配 which as a refresher, deferred rendering is just matching 与我们在视口中使用的渲染相同。 the same rendering that we're using in our viewport. 就是这个意思。 That's all that that means. 然后在 "延迟渲染 "下、 And then under this Deferred Render, 我正在做的一件事就是启用其中的一些工艺材料。 one thing that I'm doing is I'm enabling some of these process materials. 因此，如果我们仔细观察，就会发现这是一种隐藏、 So if we take a closer look, this is sort of hidden, 但如果你按下这前两个图标上的浏览图标、 but if you'd press on the Browse icon on these first two, 会自动填充运动矢量中的世界深度、 it'll always auto-populate with world depth in Motion Vectors, 这些都很不错。 which are pretty nice. 但是，如果您浏览那里，您会发现我们还有一些额外的 But if you browse to there, you'll see we have a couple additional 我们可以在这里渲染出经过后期处理的材料。 post-process materials that we can render out here. 因此，我们有了 "世界位置"，我只是把它拖到这里来。 So we have World Position, which I'm just dragging in here. 这只是一个数组。 And this is just an array. 您只需从该数组中创建或销毁元素即可。 You can just create or destroy elements from this array. 所以，我可以在这里补充一些。 So I can add a few here. 遗憾的是，您无法删除单个数组。 Unfortunately, you can't remove a single array. 你只能摧毁整个东西。 You can only destroy the entire thing. 但如果我想从头开始建立这个系统、 But if I wanted to set this up from scratch, 我会在这个数组中添加四个索引。 I would add four indexes into this array. 让我们启用所有四项功能。 Let's enable all four of them. 然后，我最常渲染的 AOV 是 "世界深度 "和 "运动矢量"、 And then the AOVs I render most often are World Depth, Motion Vectors, 其中运动矢量更多是可有可无的，但拥有它也不错、 which Motion Vectors are more optional, but nice to have, 世界常态》和《世界位置》。 World Normal, and World Position. 我将向你展示 Nuke 如何呈现这些效果。 And I'll show you how each of these render out inside of Nuke. 但你要知道，如果你打开这些东西，它们只是材料。 But just so you know, if you open up any of these, they're just materials. 这样，我就可以打开这本《世界深度》的资料了。 So I could open up this World Depth material. 你会发现这和我们的材料图是一样的。 And you'll see it's just the same thing as our material graph. 有几个特殊的节点。 There's a couple special nodes. 但这些后期处理的材料，大部分都是骨子里的东西、 But most of these post-process materials, the bones of what's going on, 你会发现我们只有一个发射色彩输入。 you'll see we just have an emissive color input. 这是因为这个材料域实际上是一种后处理材料。 And that's because this material domain is actually a post-process material. 它不像我们的大多数其他材料那样是一个表面。 It's not a surface like most of our other materials. 这是一种后期处理材料。 It's a post-process material. 就像你在预览窗口中看到的那样、 And like you can see in our preview window, 当我们把它应用到场景中时，它会覆盖整个渲染窗口。 it'll overtake our entire render window when we apply this to our scene. 而他们中的大多数人只是在拍摄场景纹理。 And most of them are just taking a scene texture. 所以，如果我输入场景纹理，你会 So if I just type in scene texture, you'll 请看，我们有一个巨大的下拉菜单，显示所有不同的缓冲区。 see we have this huge dropdown of all of the different buffers. 这些就是我们的 AOV。 So these are our AOVs. 我们有 "漫反射颜色"、"镜面颜色"、"深度"、"粗糙度"、"不透明度 "和 "世界正常值"、 We have Diffuse Color, Specular Color, Depth, Roughness, Opacity, World Normal, 金属色、基色和镜面色。 Metallic, Base Color, and Specular. 这样，我们就可以渲染出任何 AOVs。 And this is the way that we'll render out any AOVs. 因此，您可以通过创建这些后处理材料来创造额外的 AOV。 So you can create additional AOVs by creating these post-process materials. 打开一些默认设置，你就会明白到底发生了什么。 Open up some of the default ones, and you'll see exactly what's going on. 这其实相当简单。 It's actually fairly straightforward. 你会发现这些图表大多非常非常简单。 You'll see most of these graphs are very, very simple. 他们只是在洗牌，就像这个速度频道一样、 And they're just shuffling out a channel like this velocity channel, 做一些非常基本的数学运算，并将其输入 doing some really basic math, and just feeding it 以一种非常好的方式融入我们的形象。 into our image in a really nice way. 然后，它们中的很多都会有这些电平开关。 And then a lot of them will have these level switches. 这就意味着，根据所使用的渲染方法、 And all that this means is that depending on the render method used, 会给我们带来不同的结果。 it's going to give us a different result. 因此，在这种情况下，延迟渲染器会抓取这个内容。 So in this case, the deferred renderer is going to grab this. 但如果我们有一个在 VR 中使用较多的前向渲染器、 But if we had a forward renderer, which is used more in VR, 就会得出不同的结果。 it would give us a different result. 这就是后期材质处理和 AOV 渲染。 So that's post-process materials and rendering out AOVs. 我们还需要确保将 "渲染主通道 "选为 true、 And we also need to make sure this Render Main Pass is checked to true, 这基本上就是让我们把美容通行证渲染出来。 that this is basically going to have us render out our beauty pass. 这里还有一个小复选框，选择 "使用 32 位后期处理素材"。 There's also this small checkbox here for Use 32-bit Post-Process Materials. 这对我们的深度频道和我们的世界地位非常重要 This is really important for our depth channels and our world position 这将使我们的文件大小变大、 This is going to make our file size a lot bigger, 但这将使我们的数据更加准确。 but it's going to make our data more accurate. 因此，如果要渲染 AOV，一定要检查这一点。 So always check this on if you're going to render out AOVs. 下一个是对象 ID。 The next one is Object IDs. 这些也被称为 Cryptomats，会呈现出完整的数据类型。 These are also known as Cryptomats, and will render out the full data type. 稍后我将向大家展示如何使用它们。 I'll show you how we can use these later on. 但这些软件也可用于其他软件，如 After Effects 和 Fusion。 But these can also be used in other softwares like After Effects and Fusion. 然后是抗锯齿。 And then for Anti-Aliasing. 因此，通常情况下，我会在这里使用两种方法，一种是基于时间的方法 So typically, I'll have two methods here, one that is temporally based 一个是基于空间的。 and one that is spatially based. 老实说，你确实需要把它用在你的场景中 Honestly, you do just have to run this out for your scene 看看哪一个结果更好。 and see which one gives you a better result. 当我测试这个场景时，我发现空间样本数 When I've tested out this scene, I found spatial sample counts 比时间样本计数更成功。 have been more successful than temporal sample counts. 这里的主要区别在于时间样本计数。 The main difference here is a temporal sample count. 如果我将其设置为 16，就会占用一帧时间 If I set this to 16, it would take a single frame 并在一段时间内将其分成 16 份。 and divide it into 16 slices over time. 因此，每帧的时间每 16 分之 1 秒会略有增加。 So each frame is going to slightly progress in time every 1 16th of a second. 而空间采样计数将采用一个单一的静态帧 Whereas spatial sample counts are going to take the one single static frame 并重新渲染 16 次，以获得更高的质量和分辨率。 and re-render it 16 times to get more quality and resolution out of it. 因此，这些帧的时间是不同的。 So the timing of these frames is what's different. 在这种情况下，我们将使用空间样本计数。 In this case, we're going to use spatial sample counts. 如果你还记得，我们之前设置了控制台变量 And if you remember earlier, we had that console variable set up 用于我们的抗锯齿。 for our Anti-Aliasing. 但如果我们使用抗锯齿设置、 But if we use our Anti-Aliasing settings, 在这里，我们可以使用快速近似抗锯齿方法。 we can use our Fast Approximate Anti-Aliasing method here. 因此，我要启用覆盖抗锯齿功能 So I'm going to enable Override Anti-Aliasing 并选择 "快速近似抗锯齿 "以匹配 and select Fast Approximate Anti-Aliasing to match 控制台变量中的内容。 what we had in our console variables. 渲染预热计数是实际渲染的帧数。 The Render Warmup Count are frames that it'll actually render. 您将无法看到这些渲染帧、 You won't be able to see these rendered frames, 但它们会在后台发生。 but they will happen in the background. 然后发动机预热计数基本上是 And then the Engine Warmup Count is basically 让我们的比赛时间流逝 512 秒。 letting our game clock go by 512 ticks. 因此，如果您需要让尼亚加拉系统预热、 So if you need to let your Niagara systems warm up, 通常，您需要这个发动机热身计数 typically you'll need this Engine Warmup Count 要设置得相当高。 to be set to something pretty high. 就像我们的烟雾一样，大约需要 5 到 10 秒钟来预热和燃烧。 Like our smoke takes about 5 to 10 seconds to warm up and hit 粒子产卵的平衡，也有一半的粒子 that equilibrium of particles spawning in and also half of those particles 根据生命周期产卵。 spawning out based on the lifetime. 这将为发动机预热，但几乎不花时间 So this will warm up our engine, but this takes almost no time 来进行发动机热身计数。 to do this Engine Warmup Count. 而渲染预热计数需要的时间是 Whereas the Render Warmup Count will take the time 来呈现每个帧。 to render out each of those frames. 色彩输出设置非常重要 This Color Output setting is really important 当我们将图像渲染到 ACES 中时，会出现线性色彩。 when rendering our images out into ACES and having linear color. 因此，在渲染 EXR 时，请确保禁用色调曲线。 So make sure to disable the tone curve when we're rendering out EXRs. 然后，如果你有任何其他控制台变量需要输入，请点击 "输入"、 And then if you have any additional console variables to enter in, 就是这里 this is the spot to do it. 你只需在这里输入一个控制台变量，然后键入、 You'll just enter in a console variable here and type it in, 举个例子，比如 volumetricfog.gridpixelsize like volumetricfog.gridpixelsize as just a example 并将其设置为 2 或 4。 and set it to something like 2 or 4. 然后是游戏覆盖，这只是 And then for Game Overrides, this is just 将为我们提供所有高质量的电影场景 going to give us all of our high quality cinematic settings 并确保当我们使用 "电影渲染 "点击 "渲染 "时，这些内容会被包含在内 and make sure that those are included when we hit Render with Movie Render 我们的 AOV 就到此为止。 And that's it for our AOVs. 这将满足我们几乎所有的需求。 This will get us pretty much everything that we need. 然后将其保存到序列名称文件夹中、 And then we'll save it to our Sequence Name folder, 然后我们会得到序列名称和版本号、 and then we'll get a Sequence Name, Version Number, 而这个版本在每次渲染时都会自动递增。 and this version auto increments every time you render out. 确保以 "帧编号 "结束 Just make sure to end that with Frame Number 这样每帧都会递增，每个文件都有不同的名称。 so that it increments each frame and each file has a different name. 然后，如果您想设置自定义播放范围、 And then if you want to set a custom playback range, 您可以将其选为 true 并限制播放范围。 you can check this to true and limit your playback range. 我喜欢在第一次测试设置时这样做、 I like to do this when first testing out the settings, 只是渲染了 10 帧，以确保 just rendering out 10 frames to make sure 在渲染整个过程之前，一切都要调试好。 that everything's dialed in before rendering out the entire thing. 但现在，我们可以走了。 But at this point, we're good to go. 现在，我将把整个 "电影渲染队列 "文件包括在内、 Now, I'll include this entire Movie Render Queue file, 就像你在这里看到的那样，这样你就可以直接拖放这个 like you'll see here, so that you can just drag and drop this 进入你的场景。 into your scene. 但希望这能给你提供更多的背景和理解 But hopefully, this gives you a lot more context and understanding 如何运作。 on how this works. 所以我要继续按 "接受 "键、 So I'm going to go ahead and hit Accept, 我们将使用 "电影渲染队列 "来渲染。 and we'll render this out using Movie Render Queue. 然后，我们将进入 Nuke，向您展示 And then we'll pop into Nuke to show you 我们如何才能真正使用我们的 AOV how we can actually use the AOVs that we've 渲染，以改进我们对该图像的合成。 rendered to improve our compositing of this image. 因此，当我要渲染时，只需按下 "本地渲染 "键。 So when I want to render, I'll just press Render Local. 它会根据需要在场景中编译任何新的着色器。 It'll compile any new shaders that it needs to in the scene. 所以，让它渲染出来，然后我们再一起回到 Nuke 中。 So let that render out, and we'll come back together inside of Nuke.
evidences.speaker: instructor
